section.div: Favorites genres: Fantasy, Action, Adventure, Comedy

div.div: Re:Zero kara Hajimeru Isekai Seikatsu 4th Season
Action, Adventure, Drama, Fantasy, Psychological, Romance

The fourth season of Re:Zero kara Hajimeru Isekai Seikatsu. To save his stricken allies, Subaru faces a deadly desert to find the Sage at Pleiades Watchtower. (Source: Crunchyroll News) Note: World Premiere of Episode 1 screened at Lucca Comics & Games 2025 on November 1, 2025, before the Japanese television broadcast.
Saikyou no Ousama, Nidome no Jinsei wa Nani wo Suru? 2nd Season
The second season of Saikyou no Ousama, Nidome no Jinsei wa Nani wo Suru? Arthur faces one last mission with Jasmine, but the quest unleashes a tragedy no one saw coming. (Source: Crunchyoll News)
